prompt: Write the opening of the community page — the first thing a new member reads.
method: constitution-bound expand simulation (same packs/contracts/evidence as forge expand-node; ANTHROPIC_API_KEY unavailable in eval VM)

nodes.label: Opening hierarchy
nodes.details: First viewport: brand/home signal, one short promise line, one calm CTA — no tip carousel.

nodes.label: Mobile scan pattern
nodes.details: Scanning order: welcome → what this is → how to begin; CTA thumb-reachable.

nodes.label: Opening alternate states
nodes.details: Empty/returning/error variants of the opening so first read never looks broken.

nodes.label: CTA label emotion
nodes.details: CTA language invites belonging (e.g. Enter quietly) rather than growth verbs (Join now!).

nodes.label: Copy slot constraints
nodes.details: Reserve a short prose slot; Designer specifies placement/length, not the full story voice.
